person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
=== By Roland Henry Baker III | 20 February 2022 ===

Coddington, John Insley. Stebbing Family of Co. Essex, England, and Rowland, Martin, Edward and Editha Stebbing or Stebbins of New England. American Genealogist (D.L. Jacobus). (Oct 1955) 31:199

William Stebbing of Black Notley, Essex has no baptism records or burial records. We do not know his parents or the name of his wife. He had five children baptized there between 1 Nov 1593 and 18 Mar 1603/4 when he left the parish. He may be the man of the same name in the Braintree Vestry Book 6 Sep 1619. His known children in Black Notley are Ellen, Edward, Amy, Thomas and Margaret. If he was identical to the man of Braintree then also Edith in 1610. 

Everything else you read about him including his parents, his wife's name and his birth and death dates are completely fabricated and copied over the Internet by non-genealogists. Records from Suffolk do not belong to this person.

=== Links to Peer-Reviewed Scholarly Sources  ===

The American Genealogist. New Haven, CT: D. L. Jacobus, 1932-. (Online database. AmericanAncestors.org. New England Historic Genealogical Society, 2009 - .)

https://www.americanancestors.org/DB283/i/11830/199/0

The Great Migration Begins: Immigrants to New England 1620-1633, Volumes I-III. (Online database: AmericanAncestors.org, New England Historic Genealogical Society, 2010), (Originally Published as: New England Historic Genealogical Society. Robert Charles Anderson, The Great Migration Begins: Immigrants to New England 1620-1633, Volumes I-III, 3 vols., 1995).

https://www.americanancestors.org/DB393/i/12107/1753/1415520631

zh.Black Notley, Essex, England: 英國艾可布萊克 諾特利
zh.lifeSummary: William Stebbing於大約1567年出生在英國。他於大約1592年與Mrs. William Stebbing在英國艾可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1593年住在英國艾可布萊克 諾特利。他去世於1619年9月6日之後在英國艾可布萊崔。

zh-hans.Black Notley, Essex, England: 英国艾可布萊克 諾特利

nameMeanings.name: Stebbing
meanings: Anglo-Saxon: Steb, a boll, a trunk, and ing, originating from, meaning offspring of a trunk, a shoot, a branch

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: William Stebbing was born about 1567, in England. He married Mrs. William Stebbing about 1592, in Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He lived in Black Notley, Essex, England in 1593. He died after 6 September 1619, in Braintree, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: William Stebbing est né environ 1567, à Angleterre. Il a épousé Mrs. William Stebbing environ 1592, à Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il a vécu à Black Notley, Essex, Angleterre en 1593. Il est décédé après 6 septembre 1619, à Braintree, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: William Stebbing wurde um 1567 in England geboren. Er hat um 1592 in Essex, England Mrs. William Stebbing geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1593 hat er in Black Notley, Essex, England gelebt. Er starb nach 6. September 1619 in Braintree, Essex, England.

it.lifeSummary: William Stebbing è nato il circa 1567 nel England. Lui sposato Mrs. William Stebbing circa 1592, nel Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Vissuto a Black Notley, Essex, England nel 1593. Morì dopo il 6 settembre 1619, nel Braintree, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Stebbingは約1567年にイギリスで生まれた。約1592年にイギリスエセックスでMrs. William Stebbingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1593年にはイギリスエセックスブラック ノトリーに住んでいた。彼は1619年9月6日以後にイギリスエセックスブレイントレで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Stebbing(은)는 대략 1567년 영국에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1592년 영국 에세스에서 Mrs. William Stebbing(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1593년도에 영국 에세스 블랙 노틀리에서 살았다. 그는 1619년 9월 6일 이후 영국 에세스 브레이트리에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: William Stebbing nasceu aproximadamente 1567, em Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Mrs. William Stebbing aproximadamente 1592, em Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele viveu em Black Notley, Essex, Inglaterra em 1593. Ele faleceu após 6 de setembro de 1619, em Braintree, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: William Stebbing родился около 1567 г. в местности Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. William Stebbing около 1592 г. в местности эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он жил в местности блэкк нотли, эссекс, Англия в 1593 году. Он умер после 6 сентябрь 1619 г. в местности бреинтри, эссекс, Англия.
